use_cases: A versatile button component with multiple variants for primary, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles
Interactive clickable element for forms, dialogs, and navigation actions
Reusable button with size options (default, sm, lg, icon) for flexible UI composition
Accessible button supporting keyboard navigation and focus states via Radix UI Slot
AsChild pattern support for composition with other Radix primitives
ai_summary: A flexible button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority (CVA) for variant management. Features multiple visual variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles, along with size options for small, default, large, and icon buttons. The component supports composition via asChild prop, keyboard navigation, focus rings, and disabled states. Part of a shadcn/ui-style design system with clean Tailwind CSS styling and full TypeScript support.
